challenges.title: Flooding
challenges.rules: Unoccupied tiles in the top left corner of the factory floor are disabled this month

challenges.title: Floor Hazard
challenges.rules: 5 random empty factory tiles are disabled this month

challenges.title: Forced Update
challenges.rules: A random worker is disabled this month

challenges.title: Renovations
challenges.rules: The left half of offices is disabled this month

challenges.title: Sinkhole
challenges.rules: Unoccupied tiles just above the center factory floor tile are disabled this month

challenges.title: Strange Stench
challenges.rules: A random office is disabled this month

components.title: Red Conveyor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it (twice to red numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Blue Conveyor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it (twice to blue numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Green Conveyor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it (twice to green numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Yellow Conveyor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it (twice to yellow numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Red Packager
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers moved onto it (twice to red numbers), and converts them into red score multiplier

components.title: Blue Packager
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers moved onto it (twice to blue numbers), and converts them into blue score multiplier

components.title: Green Packager
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers moved onto it (twice to green numbers), and converts them into green score multiplier

components.title: Yellow Packager
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers moved onto it (twice to yellow numbers), and converts them into yellow score multiplier

components.title: Red Fabricator
components.rules: Creates four 1s and moves them each in a different direction

components.title: Blue Fabricator
components.rules: Creates four 1s and moves them each in a different direction

components.title: Green Fabricator
components.rules: Creates four 1s and moves them each in a different direction

components.title: Yellow Fabricator
components.rules: Creates four 1s and moves them each in a different direction

components.title: Red Divider
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it from the left (twice to red numbers) and divides them into three, moving those rightward, upward, & downward, respectively

components.title: Blue Divider
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it from the left (twice to blue numbers) and divides them into three, moving those rightward, upward, & downward, respectively

components.title: Green Divider
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it from the left (twice to green numbers) and divides them into three, moving those rightward, upward, & downward, respectively

components.title: Yellow Divider
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it from the left (twice to yellow numbers) and divides them into three, moving those rightward, upward, & downward, respectively

components.title: Red Launcher
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the tile to the right of it (twice to red numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Blue Launcher
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the tile to the right of it (twice to blue numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Green Launcher
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the tile to the right of it (twice to green numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Yellow Launcher
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the tile to the right of it (twice to yellow numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Red Attractor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the two tiles to the right of it (twice to red numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Blue Attractor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the two tiles to the right of it (twice to blue numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Green Attractor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the two tiles to the right of it (twice to green numbers), and moves them rightward

components.title: Yellow Attractor
components.rules: Adds 1 to numbers that are moved onto it or the two tiles to the right of it (twice to yellow numbers), and moves them rightward

component_upgrades.title: Common Row Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same row as this one get +1

component_upgrades.title: Uncommon Row Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same row as this one get +2

component_upgrades.title: Rare Row Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same row as this one get +3

component_upgrades.title: Legendary Row Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same row as this one get +4

component_upgrades.title: Common Column Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same column as this one get +1

component_upgrades.title: Uncommon Column Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same column as this one get +2

component_upgrades.title: Rare Column Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same column as this one get +3

component_upgrades.title: Legendary Column Buff
component_upgrades.rules: Components in the same column as this one get +4

operations.title: Fabricatorize
operations.rules: Make a component into a Fabricator

operations.title: Melt Down
operations.rules: Remove a component from your deck or factory floor

operations.title: Carbon Copy
operations.rules: Put a copy of a component on top of your deck

operations.title: Dividerize
operations.rules: Make a component into a Divider

operations.title: Launcherize
operations.rules: Make a component into a Launcher

operations.title: Attractorize
operations.rules: Make a component into an Attractor

workers.title: Accountant
workers.rules: Upon entering the store, gain 10% interest on held money +10% for every version beyond 1.0

workers.title: Janitor
workers.rules: ⚡1 for each number left unpacked on the factory floor

workers.title: Maintenance
workers.rules: The first component you discard each hand pays an additional ⚡1

workers.title: Marketer
workers.rules: Workers sell for ⚡1 more

workers.title: Red Mechanic
workers.rules: Red components get +1

workers.title: Blue Mechanic
workers.rules: Blue components get +1

workers.title: Green Mechanic
workers.rules: Green components get +1

workers.title: Yellow Mechanic
workers.rules: Yellow components get +1

workers.title: Up Lineworker
workers.rules: Up-facing components get +1

workers.title: Down Lineworker
workers.rules: Down-facing components get +1

workers.title: Left Lineworker
workers.rules: Left-facing components get +1

workers.title: Right Lineworker
workers.rules: Right-facing components get +1

workers.title: Capacity Manager
workers.rules: Components on the highlighted factory tiles increment an additional 1 time

workers.title: Distribution Manager
workers.rules: Components on the highlighted factory tiles increment an additional 1 time

workers.title: Logistics Manager
workers.rules: Components on the highlighted factory tiles increment an additional 1 time

workers.title: Upper Level Manager
workers.rules: Components on the highlighted factory tiles increment an additional 1 time

workers.title: Lower Level Manager
workers.rules: Components on the highlighted factory tiles increment an additional 1 time

workers.title: Welding Manager
workers.rules: Components on the highlighted factory tiles increment an additional 1 time

workers.title: Transport Manager
workers.rules: Components on the highlighted factory tiles increment an additional 1 time

workers.title: Headhunter
workers.rules: Add 3+1 rare pips to each pack distribution

workers.title: Receptionist
workers.rules: Packs cost ⚡1 less

workers.title: Recruiter
workers.rules: Add 1 uncommon, 1 rare, & 1 legendary pip to each pack distribution

workers.title: Component Developer
workers.rules: Can embed a component from your hand. Components cost ⚡1 less

workers.title: Operation Developer
workers.rules: Can embed an operation from the store. Operations cost ⚡1 less

workers.title: Vertical Director
workers.rules: Workers below this one get +1

workers.title: Horizontal Director
workers.rules: +1

workers.title: Division Overseer
workers.rules: Non-upgraded corners of the Worker to the left of this one act upgraded, giving +1

workers.title: Section Overseer
workers.rules: Non-upgraded corners of the Worker above this one act upgraded, giving +1

workers.title: Receiving Supervisor
workers.rules: The worker directly to the right of this one gets +1 and +1

workers.title: Safety Supervisor
workers.rules: The worker directly below this one gets +1 and +1

workers.title: Red Researcher
workers.rules: Get ⚡1 per red number packaged

workers.title: Green Researcher
workers.rules: Green conveyor activations score +1 green score multiplier

workers.title: Blue Researcher
workers.rules: Blue conveyors increment blue numbers an additional 1 time

workers.title: Yellow Researcher
workers.rules: Numbers that absorb others on a yellow tile are multiplied by 1

workers.title: Assembler
workers.rules: Your max hand size gets +1 +1 for every three versions beyond 1.0

workers.title: Graphic Designer
workers.rules: You cannot draw one color of components

workers.title: Inventory Clerk
workers.rules: Stationary numbers get packaged by the first Packager in the same row or column as them

workers.title: Load Planner
workers.rules: Packagers can accept numbers from any direction

workers.title: Packaging Specialist
workers.rules: Fabricators get +1 for every Packager on the factory floor

workers.title: Liquidation Developer
workers.rules: Can embed a component from your hand. Upon entering the store, sell it for ⚡1

workers.title: Industrial Engineer
workers.rules: Copy the worker directly above this one

workers.title: Mechanical Engineer
workers.rules: Copy the worker directly to the left of this one

workers.title: Chemical Engineer
workers.rules: Copy the worker diagonally to the top left of this one

workers.title: Automation Technician
workers.rules: Whenever numbers combine, conveyors get +1 until the end of the month

workers.title: Instrumentation Technician
workers.rules: Whenever a number changes color, conveyors get +1 until the end of the month

workers.title: Mechatronics Technician
workers.rules: Whenever a number's movement direction changes, conveyors get +1 until the end of the month

workers.title: Chef
workers.rules: Non-upgraded corners of Workers in the top row act upgraded, giving +1

workers.title: Chief Executive Officer
workers.rules: Workers in the row below this one get +1

workers.title: Data Scientist
workers.rules: +1 max refill

workers.title: Fabrication Specialist
workers.rules: Fabricators produce 1 additional numbers

workers.title: Procurement Agent
workers.rules: Fabricators produce numbers out of all sides

workers.title: Replication Developer
workers.rules: Can embed a component from your hand. Upon entering the store, add 1 copy of the embedded component to your deck

workers.title: Robotics Expert
workers.rules: Duplicate workers can appear in the store or in packs

worker_upgrades.title: Priority Uplink
worker_upgrades.rules: The worker directly above this one gets +1

worker_upgrades.title: Priority Downlink
worker_upgrades.rules: The worker directly below this one gets +1

worker_upgrades.title: Priority Leftlink
worker_upgrades.rules: The worker directly to the left of this one gets +1

worker_upgrades.title: Priority Rightlink
worker_upgrades.rules: The worker directly to the right of this one gets +1

worker_upgrades.title: Adaptive Cache
worker_upgrades.rules: This worker gets +1 for each of its non-upgraded corners

worker_upgrades.title: Fresh Install
worker_upgrades.rules: This worker gets +3. Upgrade discarded after 3 months

worker_upgrades.title: Rotational Link
worker_upgrades.rules: The worker directly to the right of this one gets +3

worker_upgrades.title: Iterative Calibration
worker_upgrades.rules: This worker gets +1 for every two store visits

worker_upgrades.title: Satellite Link
worker_upgrades.rules: The worker two offices to the right of this one gets +7
